metadata.reference: J. I. Larruquert, A. P. Pérez-Marín, S. García-Cortés, L. Rodríguez-de Marcos, J. A. Aznárez, J. A. Méndez. Self-consistent optical constants of SiC thin films. J. Opt. Soc. Am. A 28, 2340-2345 (2011) (Numerical data kindly provided by Juan Larruquert)
metadata.comments: Density: 2.98 g/cm<sup>3</sup>. Film deposited at room temperature.
